news.headline: Hydrolix's partner ecosystem grows, utilizes platform for real-time queries at terabyte-scale, cost-effectively.
news.summary: Hydrolix, a streaming data lake company based in Portland, Oregon, revealed today that their platform has been utilized by partners to achieve real-time query performance at terabyte-scale. This advancement comes with a significantly reduced cost, making it economically beneficial. The news, dated December 19, 2024, showcases Hydrolix's innovative approach in transforming the world of big data analytics.

news.headline: Importance of consistent R&D: Focus on innovation for success
Asante Gold Corp. in Vancouver partners with Fujairah for US$500M gold sale, providing US$100M financing over 2 years.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on Dec. 19, 2024, Asante Gold Corporation revealed that its subsidiary, Asante Gold Bibiani Ltd., has signed a deal with Fujairah Holdings LLC for the advance sale of $500 million in gold. This agreement will offer $100 million in financing to Asante Gold Corporation on a rotating basis for roughly two years. The Gold Forward Agreement terms were detailed by the company. Asante Gold Bibiani currently owns the Bibiani mine and operates under various stock symbols: CSE: ASE, GSE: ASG, FRANKFURT: 1A9, U.S.OTC: ASGOF.

news.headline: Teamsters Union attempts to disrupt Christmas sales at Amazon.
SDFCU unveils new digital banking platform for global members on Dec. 19, 2024, promising smart, secure experience.
news.summary: In Alexandria, Virginia, on December 19, 2024, the State Department Federal Credit Union (SDFCU) has unveiled its latest digital banking service. This innovative platform is meticulously crafted to provide a sophisticated, safeguarded, and tailored banking experience to its diverse members worldwide. This development showcases SDFCU's commitment to embracing digital advancements for the benefit of its widespread membership base.

news.headline: Trading activity on Coinbase's advanced platform surged in 2024 with significant growth in derivatives trading, indicating increased interest from professional traders in cryptocurrencies.
news.summary: The rapid expansion of derivatives trading products indicates a strong interest among professional traders in gaining exposure to cryptocurrencies. This trend signifies a significant increase in the trading volume and participation within this market segment.

news.headline: Kessler Foundation recognized as one of America's Best Workplaces for 2025, a program rewarding employers focused on employee growth and development. Dec 19, 2024.
news.summary: A recent award program by Best Companies Group has highlighted employers dedicated to supporting employee growth and development. In a ceremony held in East Hanover, New Jersey on December 19, 2024, Kessler Foundation, a leading nonprofit in disability services, was honored with a distinguished accolade. This recognition acknowledges Kessler Foundation's commitment to fostering a conducive environment for employee advancement and learning.

news.headline: STEP Energy Services Ltd. delays special meeting to 5:00 PM MT today; shareholder votes indicate Arrangement defeat.
news.summary: STEP Energy Services Ltd. has delayed its special shareholders' meeting from 10:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. today due to changes in votes. The meeting was initially set for December 19, 2024, in Calgary. The company stated that the Arrangement would likely be voted against as per the latest count. Some shareholders have altered or retracted their votes, leading to this decision.

news.headline: Idrive Global rebrands as IdriveAI after record-breaking 2024 in AI telematics. CEO excited for future plans.
news.summary: In Santa Barbara, California, 2024 has proven to be a productive year for Idrive, showcasing its commitment to artificial intelligence (AI) in the vehicle telematics sector. Undergoing a rebranding, Idrive Global is now known as IdriveAI, underscoring its expanding role in the industry. Sean O'Neil, CEO of IdriveAI, expressed enthusiasm for this evolution, noting, "We have been dedicated to AI for quite some time, and this change is a significant step forward. We are eager to unveil our upcoming initiatives." The year commenced on a high note for Idrive, as it presented its AI technology at CES, setting the pace for its future endeavors.

news.headline: J.D. Hupp appointed as Levata's first Chief Commercial Officer overseeing all commercial operations.
news.summary: Levata, a prominent provider of integrated technology solutions for enterprise mobility, barcoding, and access control, has recently named J.D. Hupp as its inaugural Chief Commercial Officer. The appointment was made public on December 19, 2024. Hupp will be responsible for managing all commercial activities within the company.

news.headline: UnitedHealth was the only gainer on the Dow yesterday, but today it's the top decliner.
EECU, a major Texas credit union, achieves $4 billion in assets, marking a significant milestone after 90 years.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas, on December 19, 2024, EECU, a prominent credit union in the state, achieved a significant milestone in its 90-year journey. EECU proudly disclosed that its total assets in the fourth quarter of 2024 have exceeded $4 billion. This surpass comes after previously crossing the $2 billion mark, showcasing remarkable growth for the institution.

news.headline: Hess to join Goldman Sachs Energy, CleanTech and Utilities Conference in New York.
news.summary: Hess Corporation has confirmed its participation in the upcoming Goldman Sachs Energy, CleanTech, and Utilities Conference in New York. The event is expected to feature various industry experts and executives discussing relevant topics in the sector. This conference presents an opportunity for Hess Corporation to engage with stakeholders, share insights, and explore potential collaborations. Hess Corporation's involvement underscores its commitment to staying abreast of industry trends and fostering growth opportunities. Stay tuned for updates from the conference, where key figures and important discussions are anticipated to take place.

news.headline: Semiconductor cybersecurity market report identifies key trends from 2024-2034, focusing on AI, machine learning, quantum-safe cryptography, secure designs, and zero-trust architecture - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A report titled "Semiconductor Cybersecurity Market: Global and Regional Analysis" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market for Semiconductor Cybersecurity is gaining importance due to the rising need for secure, high-performance semiconductor chips. This demand is escalating alongside the increasing number of connected devices and the advancement of Internet of Things (IoT) technology. The analysis covers the period from 2024 to 2034, focusing on aspects such as application, deployment type, solution, security type, and region. This growth reflects the significance of cybersecurity in the semiconductor industry, with global market figures indicating a surge in market value.

news.headline: Wall Street watches eagerly as key Fed inflation report looms, with PCE price index expected to climb 2.5% y/y in Nov 2024, up from 2.3% in Oct. Fed's 2% inflation target exceeded. Core PCE likely to rise to 2.9% y/y, while monthly basis slows down to 0.2% from 0.3%. Persistent inflationary pressures catalyze hawkish narrative.
news.summary: The impending release of the Personal Consumption Expenditure (PCE) price index on Friday is anticipated to play a vital role in market recovery post a sharp sell-off, catalyzed by the Federal Reserve's December meeting. Economists project a climb in the PCE price index to 2.5% year-over-year in November 2024, up from 2.3% in October, showing a monthly 0.2% increase - highlighting an annualized rate of inflation exceeding the Federal Reserve's 2% target. The Core PCE, excluding volatile food and energy prices, is expected to marginally rise from 2.8% to 2.9% year-over-year in November, also with a monthly 0.2% increase. These numbers, especially the rising inflation rates, have led to concerns around market recovery and the Federal Reserve's stance on inflation.

news.headline: Baskin-Robbins returns to Alberta after 7 years with new shop in Calgary's Southcentre Mall, 6th in expansion deal.
news.summary: A new Baskin-Robbins shop has recently opened in Calgary's Southcentre Mall, marking the brand's return to Alberta after a hiatus of seven years. This latest establishment is the sixth of its kind to open as part of a strategic partnership between Baskin-Robbins and McMaster Group Holdings, aimed at expanding into the Vancouver and Calgary markets. The franchisee of the newly launched location is Adel Ashry, who heads McMaster Group Holdings and boasts over twenty years of experience in franchising.

news.headline: $70,000 donated to 6 PA nonprofits by FirstEnergy Foundation for holiday campaign.
news.summary: As part of its yearly holiday philanthropic campaign, the FirstEnergy Foundation in Greensburg, Pennsylvania, has generously provided surprise donations known as "Gifts of the Season" worth a combined total of $70,000. These donations have been awarded to six local Pennsylvania nonprofit organizations dedicated to enhancing the community.

news.headline: YSX TECH. CO., LTD closes IPO of 1,250,000 shares at $4.00 each, raising $5,000,000 before expenses. Shares trade on Nasdaq.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, YSX TECH. CO., LTD (YSXT) completed its initial public offering (IPO) of 1,250,000 Class A ordinary shares at $4.00 per share, generating around $5,000,000 in total gross proceeds, excluding underwriting discounts and other expenses. The offering, which began trading on Nasdaq Capital Market under the symbol "YSXT" on December 18, 2024, involved the Cayman Islands-based company and its entities in China that offer business solutions predominantly to insurance firms and brokerages in the country.

news.headline: Hoffmann Green Cement expands globally with new licensing deal in UK and Ireland with Cemblend Ltd. #sustainability #construction
news.summary: In France, Hoffmann Green Cement Technologies (ISIN: FR0013451044, Ticker: ALHGR) has signed a significant licensing deal with UK partner Cemblend Ltd. This move is part of the company's commitment to reducing carbon emissions in construction by offering innovative clinker-free cements. The strategic agreement marks a key milestone in their global expansion strategy, underlining the company's position in the market. The partnership aims to further advance their mission and increase their presence internationally.

news.headline: AGCO boosts long-term targets, sets 2025 outlook at analyst meeting. Focus on farmers and shareholders.
news.summary: AGCO Corporation (NYSE: AGCO) has adopted a Farmer-First strategy that is proving successful by delivering value for farmers and providing higher through-the-cycle returns for shareholders. As a global leader in agricultural machinery and precision agriculture, AGCO's approach has yielded positive results. This approach prioritizes the needs and interests of farmers while also ensuring profitable returns for shareholders. The strategy is showing promising results and is setting a strong foundation for the company's future growth.

news.headline: Aqua PA replaces lead pipes at 1,000 locations in 62 municipalities across Pennsylvania, improving water quality.
news.summary: In Bryn Mawr, Pennsylvania, Aqua Pennsylvania has successfully replaced customer-owned lead and galvanized service lines at 1,000 properties across the state within a year. This initiative has greatly benefitted customers in 62 municipalities by upgrading the infrastructure. Customer-owned service lines, which run from the curb to buildings, were the focus of this project. Aqua, a water treatment company, continues to prioritize providing safe drinking water to communities.

news.headline: OsteoStrong to be featured in documentary Biohack Yourself on Amazon Prime Video, premiering Dec. 19, 2024.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, in Las Vegas, OsteoStrong, a prominent company specializing in skeletal strength conditioning, revealed its inclusion in the upcoming documentary "Biohack Yourself." The documentary is scheduled to debut on Amazon Prime Video and is expected to engage viewers with innovative insights into enhancing one's health and wellness.

news.headline: Kerrigan Advisors sells Country Buick GMC of Leesburg to Jaffer Syed, 80th franchise sold in 2024, 54th in Mid-Atlantic region, 284th since 2014.
news.summary: In Washington, Kerrigan Advisors, a leading sell-side advisor for auto dealers nationwide, facilitated the sale of Country Buick GMC of Leesburg in Loudoun County, Northern Virginia, to Jaffer Syed. This marks the 80th franchise sold by Kerrigan Advisors in 2024, with the transaction being the 54th franchise sold in the Mid-Atlantic region and the 284th dealership deal since 2014.

news.headline: Entergy Texas declares quarterly dividend of $0.3359375 per share on its Series A Preferred Stock, payable Jan. 15, 2025.
news.summary: In The Woodlands, Texas, on December 19, 2024, the board of directors of Entergy Texas, Inc. announced a quarterly dividend of $0.3359375 per share for its Series A Preferred Stock. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on January 15, 2025, to shareholders holding stock as of January 3, 2025.

news.headline: Mutual of America Foundation awarded 6 nonprofits the 2024 Community Partnership Award, celebrating 29 years of excellence.
news.summary: The Mutual of America Foundation recently revealed the winners of its prestigious 2024 Community Partnership Award, which celebrates its 29th year. Six noteworthy nonprofit organizations were chosen for their exceptional contributions to the community...

news.headline: OUR RESCUE expands global mission with new leadership team members; Derek Benner joins as Chief Mission Officer.
news.summary: Derek Benner, the ex-leader of Homeland Security Investigations, has been appointed as the Chief Mission Officer for OUR RESCUE, an international NGO aiding victims of sex trafficking and child exploitation. The announcement was made on December 19, 2024, in Minneapolis. OUR RESCUE works globally to rescue and assist survivors, with a significant impact on fighting these crimes.

news.headline: Over 430 Teamsters at Sysco Houston vote to strike as company refuses fair contract. 400+ workers ready for picket line.
news.summary: Over 430 employees, including drivers, warehouse workers, and mechanics represented by Teamsters Local 988, are gearing up to go on strike as Sysco has refused to provide a fair contract. The workers are preparing to form a picket line to protest the company's actions.

news.headline: Dr. Soroush Baghdadi joins Luskin Orthopaedic Institute in LA as a pediatric orthopaedic surgeon.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, the Luskin Orthopaedic Institute for Children (LuskinOIC) has announced the addition of Dr. Soroush Baghdadi to their team of pediatric orthopaedic specialists. Dr. Baghdadi brings extensive international experience and research background to the institute, having obtained his medical degree from Tehran University of Medical Sciences. His expertise will contribute significantly to advancing pediatric orthopaedic care and improving the health of children. This addition underscores LuskinOIC's commitment to providing quality orthopaedic services.

news.headline: Old Glory Bank offers limited chance to buy Class B Voting Common Stock of Old Glory Holding Company under Reg A (Tier II).
news.summary: Elmore City, Oklahoma – Old Glory Bank revealed that they are offering Americans the chance to acquire ownership in Old Glory Holding Company through the purchase of Class B Voting Common Stock. This opportunity allows individuals to buy fully tradeable shares under Regulation A (Tier II). As part of their effort to maintain ownership by Main Street instead of Wall Street, the bank has seen remarkable growth in 2023 and 2024. This initiative aims to involve freedom-loving Americans in the mission of Old Glory Bank.

news.headline: AFA renewed GSA schedule for another 5 years, providing government agencies with streamlined access to Mitchell Institute.
news.summary: AFA headquartered in Arlington, Virginia, shared on Dec. 19, 2024, that its GSA schedule listing has been renewed for five years. This allows government agencies easy access to Mitchell with the latest advancements in air and space technologies.

news.headline: Sanctuary AI introduces new tactile sensors for robots, improving touch, speed, and success rates. VANCOUVER, BC, Dec. 19, 2024.
news.summary: Cutting-edge tactile sensor technology has revolutionized the capabilities of general purpose robots by enhancing their speed and success rate. Through the integration of haptics, these robots now have the ability to handle larger volumes and generate more detailed data, resulting in superior performance levels for embodied AI models. This advancement was made by Sanctuary AI, a Vancouver-based company, on December 19, 2024.

news.headline: ViewSonic sponsors PASVEX Robotics Event at PAS in Taiwan with 61 international teams, held from Dec 19-21, 2024.
news.summary: In BREA, California, on December 19, 2024, ViewSonic Corp, a top global visual solutions provider, sponsors the 2024-25 PASVEX Robotics Signature Event occurring from December 19 to 21 at the Pacific American School (PAS) in Hsinchu, Taiwan. The event features 61 international teams from various countries.

news.headline: A1 Garage Door Service acquires The Garage Doctor in Denver, expanding its presence. Dec. 19, 2024. - PRNewswire.
news.summary: A1 Garage Door Service, a prominent player in the garage door service and sales sector, has recently completed the acquisition of The Garage Doctor, a company known for its operations in the greater Denver area of Colorado. This acquisition, finalized on December 19, 2024, further strengthens A1 Garage Door Service's presence in Denver. A1 Garage Door Service's expansion move into the Denver market marks a strategic step towards growth in the region. This acquisition transaction highlights the company's commitment to expanding its market reach.

news.headline: Tim Tebow receives David Siegel Hero Award at Victoria's Voice Foundation gala in Jupiter, FL. Funds raised to fight opioid crisis.
news.summary: An exclusive event held in Jupiter, Florida recently raised funds to combat the opioid crisis. The special gala, hosted by Victoria's Voice Foundation on December 15, 2024, honored Tim Tebow for his dedicated efforts in the fight against opioid abuse. Tebow was presented with the prestigious David Siegel Hero Award for his impactful work. This event aimed to bring attention to the widespread issue of opioid addiction and support initiatives working towards alleviating this pressing problem. The occasion garnered participation from a significant number of attendees, with a substantial amount of funds raised to contribute to the ongoing battle against the opioid crisis.

news.headline: Envestnet Elevate 2025: Register now to unlock platform power at WealthTech event in Vegas on April 9-10, join thousands.
news.summary: Envestnet will be presenting its latest innovations, future strategies, and ways to maximize the capabilities of its wealth management platform to enhance advisor productivity and facilitate growth. The event will take place in Las Vegas on April 9-10 and will be attended by thousands of financial advisors, RIAs, enterprises, and FinTech leaders. This two-day event is expected to attract a significant number of industry professionals interested in leveraging technology for wealth management solutions.

news.headline: Global battery separators market analysis for 2024-2034 focusing on end use industry, type, thickness, material, technology, regions.
news.summary: A report on the Battery Separators Market has been recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market analysis covers the period of 2024-2034 and focuses on end-use industry, battery type, separator type, thickness, material, technology, and region. The battery separators market is essential for energy storage as they are integral to the design and functionality of modern batteries, serving as insulating barriers. This market report provides a detailed analysis of global and regional trends, with a comprehensive examination of key factors influencing the market.

news.headline: Identity Digital recognized on Newsweek Excellence 1000 Index for inclusive and ethical practices, representing top companies.
news.summary: Bellevue, Washington - Newsweek recently released their latest rankings for the Excellence 1000 Index. Identity Digital™, a prominent player in facilitating online connectivity through domain names and associated technologies, secured a spot on the prestigious list. The annual Newsweek Excellence 1000 Index for 2025 was compiled in partnership with the Best Practice Institute (BPI), known for its expertise in leadership development and benchmark research. This index features the top 1000 companies that have showcased outstanding performance in their respective fields.

news.headline: Personify Health enhances employee experiences in 2025 with new journeys, challenges, and video content to boost engagement and outcomes for millions of members.

In 2025, members can expect refreshed journeys, challenges, and video content to boost engagement, motivation, and outcomes. This update aims to provide a more interactive and personalized experience for users.

news.headline: PAR, Inc. donates to NAMI in their Pay It Forward campaign, helping mental illness, 11th year running.
news.summary: In Lutz, Florida on December 19, 2024, PAR, Inc. has launched its eleventh annual Pay It Forward campaign during the holiday season. The prominent publisher of psychological assessment tools has selected the National Alliance on Mental Illness (NAMI) as this year's beneficiary. This generous initiative reflects PAR, Inc.'s commitment to giving back, with the aim to support NAMI and its crucial mission in assisting individuals affected by mental illness.

news.headline: MoneyLion and MrBeast launch $4.2 million giveaway for new 'Beast Games' competition show on Prime Video.
news.summary: In New York, MoneyLion (NYSE: ML) has teamed up with "Beast Games," a competition series by YouTube star Jimmy Donaldson, known as MrBeast. The show debuted on Prime Video, targeting a large audience. MoneyLion, a financial platform serving over 18 million Americans, aims to promote financial literacy and empowerment through this collaboration. By emphasizing Borrow, Earn, Learn, and Win, MoneyLion seeks to assist individuals in managing their finances effectively. This partnership highlights MoneyLion's commitment to empowering individuals through innovative financial solutions.

news.headline: Speedway Children's Charities awards $4 million in grants nationwide, $72 million total since 1982, benefiting thousands of children annually.
news.summary: Access logos for this announcement by clicking here. Speedway Children's Charities, established in 1982, has allocated more than $72 million throughout the U.S., benefiting numerous children annually. Individuals interested in backing this cause can sign up to volunteer or contribute to Speedway Children's charitable efforts.

news.headline: Zelus Fitness introduces top weighted vest model. Unique design boosts success. Brand's official launch increased sales by 30%.
news.summary: In Anaheim, California on December 19, 2024, Zelus Fitness shared their excitement for the remarkable achievement of their weighted vest line, notably the Weight Vest for Running and Training. This specific vest stands out due to its distinctive matching design. Following the brand's official launch, the Weight Vest for Running and Training has gained immense popularity, with sales totaling a significant number.

news.headline: National Grid Partners invests over $500M in energy future, 80% of companies engage with parent company for innovation.
news.summary: A venture arm of the utility industry based in Silicon Valley has reported that close to 80% of its portfolio companies have collaborated with its parent company to enhance the grid, streamline operations, and spearhead advancements in innovation. This update was shared from Menlo Park, California on December 19, 2024.

news.headline: Mortgage rates increase for the holidays with 30-year fixed-rate mortgage averaging 6.72 percent.
news.summary: Freddie Mac, based in McLean, Va., announced the findings of its Primary Mortgage Market Survey® (PMMS®) on December 19, 2024. According to the report, the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) stood at an average of 6.72 percent.

news.headline: Torr Metals closes first tranche of private placement, raising $492,310. Conducted geophysical survey at Filion site.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, Torr Metals Inc. (TSX-V: TMET.V), a mineral exploration company focusing on copper and gold projects in British Columbia and Ontario, closed the first tranche of its non-brokered private placement. The company issued 760,919 flow-through units priced at $0.12 per unit and 4,010,000 non-flow-through units priced at $0.10 per unit, resulting in total gross proceeds of $492,310. The remaining non-flow-through portion of the private placement is expected to close by January 17, 2025.

news.headline: Jean-Paul Kress appointed to Sanofi's Board of Directors in latest press release.
Mikko Kemppainen appointed General Counsel at Orion Group, effective June 1, 2025. announced on 19 December 2024 at 19.00 EET.
news.summary: Reorganization at Orion Corporation has been announced on December 19, 2024, at 19:00 EET. The changes involve the board, management, and auditors. This strategic decision marks a significant shift within the company and reflects its commitment to enhancing performance and governance. Stay tuned for further updates on this development.

news.headline: Freddie Mac: US 30-yr fixed rate mortgages 6.72% December 19 week vs 6.60% prior week.
Soho House (NYSE: SHCO) receives $9 per share acquisition offer, 83% premium to Dec 18, 2024 close, backed by Ron Burkle and Yucaipa.
news.summary: Shares of Soho House & Co Inc. (NYSE:SHCO) are seeing an increase in trading value following a recent acquisition offer by a third-party consortium, offering $9.00 per share. This represents an 83% premium compared to the closing price on December 18, 2024. The acquisition offer has garnered support from the company's Executive Chairman, Ron Burkle, and The Yucaipa Companies. This offer comes after a strategic review conducted by Yucaipa and its advisors to better showcase the true value of the company. The offer is conditional upon important shareholders rolling over their stakes. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ONWARD Medical gains FDA De Novo for non-invasive Spinal Cord Stimulation System for Chronic Spinal Cord Injury patients.
news.summary: ONWARD Medical has been granted FDA De Novo classification and market authorization in the US for the world's inaugural non-invasive spinal cord stimulation system. This groundbreaking system represents a significant advancement in medical technology, offering patients a non-surgical alternative for managing spinal cord conditions. This achievement marks a milestone in the medical field, with an estimated market size of over [insert approximate number] individuals suffering from spinal cord issues who could potentially benefit from this innovative treatment.
